creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
irc/znc modpython requires python 3.X. So this patch doesn't help. So far I cannot find any references of devel/py-enum34 or security/py-cryptography in any of the log files here http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/znc/1.7.2_1/

So I believe you are trying to install with additional OPTIONS other than the OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

For further investigation please provide full log and other options you have enabled.
